title: 1: Code Maintainability
1.1: Changes NewMetricsEngine in metrics/engine/engine.go to accept both explicit dependencies (*metrics.Registry, logrus.FieldLogger)
1.2: Removes threshold and submetric initialization logic from the NewMetricsEngine constructor body in metrics/engine/engine.go
1.3: Exports an InitSubMetricsAndThresholds method on MetricsEngine in metrics/engine/engine.go that accepts both parameters (lib.Options and a flag controlling error-only logging)
1.4: Calls InitSubMetricsAndThresholds only when thresholds or end-of-test summary are enabled in cmd/run.go
1.5: Exports the outputIngester type as OutputIngester in metrics/engine/ingester.go
1.6: Updates StartThresholdCalculations in metrics/engine/engine.go to accept an *OutputIngester parameter
1.7: Changes CreateIngester in metrics/engine/engine.go to return *OutputIngester as the concrete type
1.8: Adds all 5 accessor methods (Min(), Max(), Count(), Avg(), Total()) to TrendSink in metrics/sink.go
1.9: Adds a NewTrendSink constructor function in metrics/sink.go that returns *TrendSink
1.10: Updates callers of TrendSink in metrics/sample.go to use all 4 accessor methods (Min(), Max(), Avg(), Count())
1.11: Updates Thresholds.Run in metrics/thresholds.go to use the 3 TrendSink accessor methods (Min(), Max(), Avg())
1.12: Renames the named error return in Scheduler.Init in execution/scheduler.go to an error name derived from the function name
1.13: Renames the named error return in Scheduler.Run in execution/scheduler.go to an error name derived from the function name
1.14: Updates the deferred closure in Scheduler.Init in execution/scheduler.go to reference the renamed error variable
1.15: Updates deferred closure in Scheduler.Run in execution/scheduler.go to reference the renamed error variable
1.16: Removes the DummySink type and all 3 of its methods (IsEmpty, Add, Format) from metrics/sink.go
1.17: Removes the DummySink case from the type switch in Thresholds.Run in metrics/thresholds.go
1.18: Removes all 5 TrendSink fields (Min, Max, Count, Avg, Values) from the public API of metrics/sink.go
2: Documentation Maintainability
2.1: Adds a GoDoc comment for the exported InitSubMetricsAndThresholds method in metrics/engine/engine.go
3: Artifact Cleanup
3.1: Removes the outputIngester field from the MetricsEngine struct in metrics/engine/engine.go
4: Negative Rubrics
4.1: Leaves the call site in cmd/run.go still using the old NewMetricsEngine(*lib.TestRunState) signature
4.2: Leaves production code reading TrendSink statistics via direct access to any of the 4 unexported fields (.Min, .Max, .Avg, .Count) instead of using accessor methods
